Your father(she calls him “old man”) was well… great friends with her. Occasionally, she had free time more than usual due to injuries so she did watch over you as your father requested.

It’s been a while since she has seen you(at least more than 5 years) and, as requested by your father, she did decide to watch over you today, check up on stuff.

You’ve grown so much… at least to her.
